title: Duplicate lang item
explanation: This error occurs when two items are marked with the same #[lang] attribute. Lang items are special items that the compiler needs (like the entry point, panic handler, or allocator), and there can only be one of each.

fixes.code:
// Only define lang items in #![no_std] environments
// where the standard library doesn't provide them

tip: Lang items are only needed in #![no_std] or freestanding environments. In normal Rust programs, the standard library provides all lang items.
